author: codex-maintainer

patch.value: User asked that the imported .agents/pm/issues and .agents/pm/history files be versioned as well. Audit them for private data first, then commit and push only if clean.
Track and commit imported pm issue/history files
Audit the untracked imported Dependabot pm issue/history files for private data, then commit and push the safe tracker records so repository pm data stays complete.

1) Untracked pm issue/history files are audited for secrets or private data. 2) Safe files are committed and pushed. 3) The commit excludes unrelated local-only tracker files if any remain unsafe or unrelated.
Imported untracked pm issue/history files are present in the worktree and their origin is understood.
Version imported pm issue/history records safely
Keeps repository pm data complete and reproducible
Dependabot-derived tracker items and histories become part of the repo state
Imported pm issues/history are committed without leaking private data
The user explicitly wants the imported issue/history files tracked in git.
Repository users can inspect current security-tracker items directly from git history.

value.author: codex-maintainer
value.text: Audit imported tracker files for private data before committing them.

value.author: codex-maintainer
value.text: Use pm as the system of record while preserving append-only item history.

value.note: tracked-file credential scan after staging intended files

message: Create task for committing imported pm issue/history files | explicit_unset=dependencies,learnings,order,assignee,parent,reviewer,sprint,release,blocked_by,blocked_reason,unblock_note,reporter,severity,environment,repro_steps,resolution,expected_result,actual_result,affected_version,fixed_version,regression

author: codex-maintainer
message: Start tracker file audit and commit work

value.author: codex-maintainer
value.text: Audited 13 imported issue files and 13 matching history logs. No credentials, tokens, private keys, JWT-like strings, emails, or auth-token assignments were found. Content is limited to Dependabot advisory metadata, package paths, and repository alert reference URLs.

value.author: codex-maintainer
value.text: Evidence: staged imported issue/history files passed node scripts/check-secrets.mjs, targeted regex audit found no credentials/private keys/JWT-like strings/emails, and git diff --cached --check reported no whitespace or patch-format issues.

author: codex-maintainer

patch.value: Imported pm issue/history files were audited, found free of credential-like private data, and are ready to be committed and pushed.

message: Close: imported pm issue/history files audited and ready for commit/push
